zh.Heron Hall, East Horndon, Essex, England: 英國艾可易亞斯特 霍登
zh.Bambrough, Northumberland, England: 英國諾圖波藍德班布盧
zh.lifeSummary: 當Jordan de Héron IV於大約1200年出生時，他的父親Jordan De Héron19歲，母親Lady Jordan De Heron14歲。他於大約1215年與Isabel de Néville在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1247年之後在英國諾圖波藍德班布盧。

zh-hans.Bambrough, Northumberland, England: 英国諾圖波藍德班布盧
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jordan de Héron IV于大约1200年出生时，他的父亲Jordan De Héron19岁，母亲Lady Jordan De Heron14岁。他于大约1215年与Isabel de Néville在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1247年之后在英国諾圖波藍德班布盧。

nameMeanings.name: Héron
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Herron  .
French (Héron): nickname for a tall, thin person, thought to resemble a heron (Old French hairon).

variants.name: Herron
meanings: English: habitational name from Harome (North Yorkshire), from Old English (æt thǣm) hārum ‘at the (gray) stones’, dative plural of hār ‘gray, stone’.

English and Scottish: nickname probably for a tall, thin man with long legs, from Old French hairon ‘heron’, Anglo-Norman French heron, Middle English heiroun, heyron, herne, heron. Compare Hearn and Heron .
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from (Le) Héron in France (Seine-Maritime).

nameMeanings.name: Jordan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a name given to a child of either sex baptized in holy water that was, purportedly at least, brought from the River Jordan, whose Hebrew name, ha-yarden, means ‘flowing down’. It was in this river that Christ was baptized by John the Baptist, and medieval pilgrims to the Holy Land usually tried to bring back a flask of its water with them. The modern given name is either a revival of this, or else a transferred use of the surname that was derived from the medieval given name. It is more popular as a boy's name in Britain and as a girl's name in the United States.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Jordan de Héron IV was born about 1200, his father, Jordan De Héron, was 19 and his mother, Lady Jordan De Heron, was 14. He married Isabel de Néville about 1215, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died after 1247, in Bambrough, Northumberland, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jordan de Héron IV est né environ 1200, son père, Jordan De Héron, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Lady Jordan De Heron, avait 14 ans. Il a épousé Isabel de Néville environ 1215, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé après 1247, à Bambrough, Northumberland, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jordan de Héron IV um 1200 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Jordan De Héron 19 und seine Mutter Lady Jordan De Heron 14. Er hat um 1215 in England Isabel de Néville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb nach 1247 in Bambrough, Northumberland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jordan de Héron IV è nato il circa 1200, il suo padre, Jordan De Héron, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Lady Jordan De Heron, aveva 14 anni. Lui sposato Isabel de Néville circa 1215, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì dopo il 1247, nel Bambrough, Northumberland, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Jordan de Héron IVが約1200年に生まれた時，父Jordan De Héronは19歳，母Lady Jordan De Heronは14歳であった。約1215年にイギリスでIsabel de Névilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1247年以後にイギリスノースウンバーランドバンブロウで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jordan de Héron IV(이)가 대략 1200년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jordan De Héron(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Jordan De Heron(은)는 14세였다. 그는 대략 1215년 영국에서 Isabel de Néville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1247년 이후 영국 노르스벌랜드 바브루그h에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jordan de Héron IV nasceu aproximadamente 1200, seu pai, Jordan De Héron, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Lady Jordan De Heron, tinha 14 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel de Néville aproximadamente 1215, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu após 1247, em Bambrough, Northumberland, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jordan de Héron IV родился около 1200 г., его отцу по имени Jordan De Héron было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Jordan De Heron, 14. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel de Néville около 1215 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер после 1247 г. в местности бамброую, нортумбирланд, Англия.

sm.about 1200–after 1247: e tusa o le 1200–ina ua ma'ea le 1247

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jordan de Héron IV nació aproximadamente 1200, su papá, Jordan De Héron, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Lady Jordan De Heron, tenía 14 años. Se casó con Isabel de Néville aproximadamente 1215, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió después de 1247, en Bambrough, Northumberland, Inglaterra.
